changelog: **Fork compatibility boundary:** consumer projects now use the fork-owned 1.x version line. The CLI and templates are maintained from this source checkout; no package-registry update path is available.
migrationGuide:
## Upgrade to the fork-owned 1.0.0 line

This is a one-time compatibility boundary for projects previously managed by upstream 0.6.x releases. Run `trellis update --migrate` from a source-built fork CLI. The existing 0.6.x migration manifests remain part of this update path and are applied in version order.

Update the fork checkout and rebuild its CLI before updating a project. The CLI does not install or replace itself.
aiInstructions: For an upstream 0.6.x consumer, first confirm the project stamp in `.trellis/.version`, then run `trellis update --dry-run --migrate` before applying `trellis update --migrate`. Do not run an update against this fork repository's own `.trellis/` deployment.
notes: This fork starts its compatibility version line at 1.0.0. Update the source checkout to the intended revision, rebuild the CLI, then run `trellis update --migrate` for an existing consumer project.
